arts.ttl: Real Madrid 4-4 Real Sociedad (agg 5-4): Los Blancos overturn two-goal deficit to reach Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Real Madrid, will play either Barcelona or Atletico Madrid in next month’s Copa del Rey final in Seville next month

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news: Gabriel, Jurrien Timber forced off ahead of Real Madrid showdown, who could partner William Saliba?
arts.sum: Arsenal defenders Gabriel and Jurrien Timber are doubts for the Champions League clash with Real Madrid after being forced off with injury against Fulham this evening.

arts.ttl: Arteta facing defensive injury crisis ahead of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta faces an anxious wait over the fitness of four defenders ahead of next week's Champions League quarter-final first leg against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid (5)4-4(4) Real Sociedad: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Los Blancos survive major scare to reach Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Real Madrid survive a major scare to seal their place in the Copa del Rey final with a dramatic 5-4 aggregate victory over Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid needs extra time to oust Real Sociedad and advance to Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Madrid had won the first leg 1-0 in February, but Sociedad took the second leg 4-3 after Mikel Oyarzabal scored in stoppage time in regulation, when both teams scored twice after the 80th minute. Real Madrid needed extra time to get past Real Sociedad and reach its second Copa del Rey final in three seasons on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Three questions and three answers from Real Madrid 4-4 (5-4 agg.) Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Any Real Madrid coach is going to have questions to answer after conceding four goals at home, regardless of whether the team makes it through to a cup final. Real Madrid secured a place in the Copa del Rey final by seeing off Real Sociedad in extra-time with a 4-4 draw which adds to the 1-0 first leg win in San Sebastián to secure a 5-4 aggregate victory.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fans take aim at Carlo Ancelotti for decision during Real Sociedad meeting
arts.sum: The home crowd in attendance at Real Madrid’s meeting with Real Sociedad this evening made crystal clear their frustrations with one particular personnel selection made by boss Carlo Ancelotti. The…

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka makes up for lost time as Arsenal star enjoys dream return ahead of Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Arsenal’s star man hits ground running ahead of next week’s Champions League clash with Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes bust-up sums up Man Utd woes and adds fuel to Real Madrid links
arts.sum: NOTTINGHAM FOREST 1-0 MANCHESTER UNITED: Bruno Fernandes was left frustrated as the Red Devils suffered defeat again, with the defeat coming just days after the club captain was linked with Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Endrick joins Cristiano Ronaldo in Real Madrid history books during Real Sociedad clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid starlet Endrick has on Tuesday evening secured for himself a piece of altogether noteworthy recent club history. This comes owing to developments in Los Blancos’ latest outing. Real…
